tools.name: numerology_profile
tools.description: Full deterministic Pythagorean numerology profile from a name and birth date: Life Path, Expression/Destiny, Soul Urge, Personality, Birthday, Maturity and Personal Year, each with reduction trail. No AI.

tools.name: life_path
tools.description: Life Path number (the core numerology number) reduced from a birth date, with reduction trail and meaning.

tools.name: name_numbers
tools.description: Expression/Destiny, Soul Urge and Personality numbers from a name, Pythagorean method, with meanings.

tools.name: compatibility
tools.description: Numerology compatibility between two Life Path numbers (1–9 or master 11/22/33).
